message:
test(unit): expand spsc_ring_buffer (13→31) and tui/rollout (9→21) inline tests (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Add 18 new tests for SPSC ring buffer covering capacity stress, large batches,
non-Copy payloads (String, Vec), concurrent producer/consumer, depth consistency,
close idempotency, and value recovery on send errors.

Add 12 new tests for TUI rollout covering trait impls, case sensitivity,
parse_backend edge cases, Display↔parse roundtrip, and whitespace handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
